summary: Gruber reminds readers that the Daring Fireball t-shirt store is closing the next day, urging last-minute purchases. He highlights the Kevin Cornell-designed 'Daredevil Helmet' shirt as a particular draw. The post serves as a final call for the membership and swag promotion cycle. He closes with genuine gratitude to readers whose memberships enable him to write Daring Fireball full-time.
key_points: The DF t-shirt store is closing the following day until the next promotion cycle
The Kevin Cornell-designed 'Daredevil Helmet' shirt is highlighted as a limited opportunity
Reader memberships directly fund Gruber's ability to write DF full-time
money_quotes: Every time I say so it feels a bit corny, but it really is thanks to readers like you that I can write DF full-time.
key_insight: Gruber's reader-supported membership model enables independent full-time blogging, a relationship he acknowledges with sincere if self-conscious gratitude.
